positive: Minimalist geometric illustration featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette emerging from a calm, flowing crescent moon. The mountains should utilize clean, overlapping polyhedral shapes in muted earth tones (sienna, terracotta, deep slate blue), contrasted by a bright, solid yellow and deep indigo sky. Incorporate negative space and abstract cosmic elements like small, scattered constellations and gentle, flowing arcing lines to suggest celestial movement. Composition must be highly symmetrical, centered, and designed for a clean, modern apparel print. Flat vector illustration style, clean lines, high contrast, perfect symmetry, negative space artwork, suitable for screen printing.
